## Roadmap Alignment

- [ ] Phase 1 — Better Training Data
- [ ] Phase 2 — Better AI Architecture (multi-label, line-level, CWE mapping)
- [ ] Phase 3 — Better Suggestions (auto-fix, explanations)
- [ ] Phase 4 — Production Ready (bulk scan, VS Code plugin, SaaS)
